name: Portal
description: Rows of nested doorways rising and sinking from the baseline — every redraw rebuilds the skyline of arches in new heights and hues.

code.style: --arch1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --arch2: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --h1: @rand(55%, 94%); --h2: @rand(24%, 48%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 16%; bottom: 0; width: 68%; height: var(--h1); background: var(--arch1); border-radius: 999px 999px 0 0; transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 31%; bottom: 0; width: 38%; height: var(--h2); background: var(--arch2); border-radius: 999px 999px 0 0; transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
